textByHashes.66cb593e336c79110e84a37cef795fa9eeb9cc5a: Good day Proselyte. Is there anything I can do for you?
textByHashes.f90797de05eb74ad7b8178d206adcf5963faf639: A Mahjarrat! You must be pulling on my leg, what?
textByHashes.4fd02b831b13dd62a3d4fb9ce64bb0c0648f2d79: Sliske, hmm? We have dossiers on many Mahjarrat, but I must confess, this is a new name to me. Poor show! I'll have to see what we have hiding in the archives.
textByHashes.71824a6291b4720a6929ee17b26ef60233ce91cf: A mind controlling artefact you say? Sounds like I'll need to report this to the top brass. Can't see them being too thrilled about it. Thank you for the update, old bean.
textByHashes.4fefd3679f0bc62c2bd34d03db2dc68335f1166b: A mind controlling artefact you say? First Lucien and the Stone, and now this! The top brass will need to be made aware. Can't see them being too thrilled about it. Thank you for the update, old bean.
textByHashes.5ebe7333a0da63d9a7e1f7eae5703881d79e2d20: Jolly good show on getting into the White Knights, what?
textByHashes.50ba404eb6212890daf930a5959d764ea1e913bb: Now how can I help you old boy?
textByHashes.59be56c2d669ed98f33b8cd89238ebc8b98fa16c: Now how can I help you old girl?
textByHashes.208bec3193d1a293444c6bf64f479285e762f9ae: Now how can I help you old bean?
textByHashes.64a503056d263d0991fdf4d97312bc4e36bb9c54: This wouldn't be about that old relic being stolen from Entrana, would it?
textByHashes.2e245b3c7cae3f3f27d3a4269c191765ae4fe669: Part of the business, old bean. So what do you know about what went on?
textByHashes.179697795ea579bd544ee2f3df45498d1e27e2d1: Good, that confirms our own intel. We will get to work at once.
textByHashes.787e036bc7d7ee5ca08198369c21ba802619ef4e: Not yet, but we'll be in touch if we need you, old bean. For now, you should be on your way, but don't worry, we'll get to the bottom of this!
textByHashes.6f5da43616e251d429f5e3c0d60a53da131363b0: Before this meeting, I thought I'd have a good old rummage around in our archives. I'm afraid the old bean is right. War is inevitable.
textByHashes.6707ed4745d624664d9f5bd8d134a077142c2b0f: Well said, fellow. Well said indeed.
textByHashes.00592f5da5019b6d33e513602384f10915aa72db: We've got your back, . Now you show that dragon what for!
textByHashes.1c3216163db9746b515d6609755c0e5bfd4247eb: What ho, sirrah. Spiffing day for a walk in the park, what?
textByHashes.5d23cc9965295ab3c7a3a91031e9a3d574d272a5: Absolutely, top-hole! Well, can't stay and chat all day, dontchaknow! Ta-ta for now!
textByHashes.e9bd68e810aba5d418dfa900a787d22bf5d85fd9: Ah, ! Amik told me all about you, dontchaknow! Spiffing job you did with the old Black Knights there, absolutely first class.
textByHashes.b49ef24ee34e787cc00286ef608c23898cd49e37: Well, a top-notch fellow like yourself is just the right sort we've been seeking for our organisation.
textByHashes.c32d6fe0328d61cc5a4ce8a4670371796e6c19d7: Jolly bad show! Varze was supposed to have informed you about all this before sending you here!
textByHashes.754455faf91f713f68c316ac334ffb72875e5422: Well, not your fault I suppose, what? Anywho, our organisation is looking for a certain specific type of person to join.
textByHashes.4bb3ce366f2c6cd814781aa3a4763a88e2e404d6: Not at all, old bean. There's plenty of warriors around should we require dumb muscle.
textByHashes.45334e44909c09edb3b0297a2bebddca159839d4: That's really not the kind of thing our organisation is after, what?
textByHashes.01f8823618a5a80d4aafa7bee03266b6ffdc760d: Haw haw haw What a dull thing to ask of someone, what?
textByHashes.1c5269861678512f13f8be6d64454ef2ffd2cd37: I know what you mean though, I did my fair share of running errands when I was a young adventurer, myself!
textByHashes.13e944c1982a51523540ef11ee7f0f2293c5256f: Can't let just any old riff-raff in, what? The mindless thugs and bully boys are best left in the White Knights or the Guards, we look for the top-shelf brains to join us.
textByHashes.819212820508a3add64543933802cfb496a30df6: Haw Haw Haw That's a good one!
textByHashes.de1c659372175c5c8124f7fdb2144bfaf3427d73: Not in the slightest... Well, maybe a bit, but we all have to make sacrifices occasionally, what?
textByHashes.901c012f16f9a7c1af5cdb4d51e2e4bf25d0b691: It's a test of wits, what? I'll take you to our secret training grounds, and you will have to pass through a series of five separate intelligence tests to prove you're our sort of
textByHashes.66e62ed0802a8f54710436646ae3a8378dab9b82: Standard puzzle room rules will apply.
textByHashes.71fc770794d16704a7f1535d0debf19ab756ec1e: Never done this sort of thing before, what?
textByHashes.56244d74b375dd4c7fe70be460c9449c4add43e1: The simple rules are: No items or equipment to be brought with you. Each room is a self contained puzzle. You may quit at any time.
textByHashes.bd6337acf1ada42f90cd017a9e9916d5db565aff: Of course, if you quit a room, then all your progress up to that point will be cleared, and you'll have to start again from scratch.
textByHashes.819e9c5a4efa856d266028b339c5962f25420920: Our organisation manages to filter all the top-notch adventurers this way. So, are you ready to go?
textByHashes.7d9b759a814be6d045df39bc0d11632f39b1e65f: Oh, that Amik! Jolly bad form, did he not tell you anything that he was supposed to?
textByHashes.5f58cba1ab43044051b167a4eb760ee10050154b: Well now old sport, let me give you the heads up and the low down, what?
textByHashes.1f9daf5f663b7a9e393f6f0d9b8618fac095df81: I represent the Temple Knights. We are the premier order of Knights in Asgarnia, if not the world. Saradomin himself personally founded our order
textByHashes.42780a942f37cbd9cfde3965675e52616a73b880: centuries ago, and we answer only to him.
textByHashes.333b8cf0d2e9f9ae826f0dc094c086cdc7b59459: Only the very best of the best are permitted to join, and the powers we command are formidable indeed.
textByHashes.4db95d9d65841596ae1ae38dd3737549028b4a81: You might say that we are the front line of defence for the entire kingdom!
textByHashes.92fef486adbc59e2751b7179fd23f3e653bad790: Well, in simple terms, we're better! Any fool with a sword can manage to get into the White Knights, which is mostly the reason they are so very, very incompetent, what?
textByHashes.0b42cf9ffe6302b61cd4139593aeecdbb81b3816: The Temple Knights on the other hand have to be smarter, stronger, better than all others. We are the elite. No man controls us for our orders come directly from
textByHashes.9eba7794b2553758bf12340ff184a0e22a1c27b1: Well, uh, not exactly... Sir Vey Lance, our head of operations, is the only one of our order who has ever personally met Saradomin, but everything he tells us to do is done with
textByHashes.302c6bf6098e082f86bd69316a7c824c4d1d40c7: It's not every job where you have more authority than the king, now is it?
textByHashes.7e519a583262dfea03e70fa518dbc416cb7ddbe9: Well, not me personally, I'm only in the recruitment side of things dontchaknow, but the higher ranking members of the organisation have almost absolute power over this kingdom.
textByHashes.2bee642770070e3618bfe8498d1d424f95579938: Plus a few others, so I hear....
textByHashes.fd1b2635f2aa0d783ae308a8b3217c4b133337aa: Anyway, this is why we keep our organisation shrouded in secrecy, and why we demand such rigorous testing for all potential recruits. Speaking of which, are you ready to begin your
textByHashes.38c5a4a98682039296350f0d2eafb346fd84131b: Well, bad luck old boy, you'll need to have a completely empty inventory and you can't be wearing any equipment before we can accurately test you.
textByHashes.ad11f2f484d96fce65e9981719c1773df12d9b66: Well, bad luck old gal, you'll need to have a completely empty inventory and you can't be wearing any equipment before we can accurately test you.
textByHashes.d6bd1a8ace79e1bf4ac3eaded2cc78ac3273dd8a: Well, bad luck old bean, you'll need to have a completely empty inventory and you can't be wearing any equipment before we can accurately test you.
textByHashes.71d76c9a1a346f4029b4365d444b42a0dbe22048: Don't want people cheating by smuggling stuff in, what?
textByHashes.031d00345091d8b3f8d3a11f443fc82f0c1073ee: Come and see me again after you've been to the old bank to drop your stuff off, what?
textByHashes.62ab0cbe0cf09c42f9e912873ca63e6e6a9c524a: Jolly good show! Now, the training grounds location is a secret so...
textByHashes.892d4291f60b3599838cf6eed2f58f3b947961c6: Here we go! Mind your head!
textByHashes.c065cb791afdd69c826efa85e51ceadcd448ad30: Oops, ignore the smell! Nearly there!
textByHashes.2fea52b93eabf72b15061a64251ff89818b54fdd: And... Here we are! Best of luck!
textByHashes.78421f07318aa97f0c30a78ca72e010c24708a8a: Well, it takes all sorts to make the world spin, what? Maybe you'll find a nice job with the Guards sometime.
textByHashes.0cf7e7dac2b51b4de7d61430e444aa1f59e53500: Sad though, your intelligence file seemed quite promising. Should you change your mind, you come back and let me know, what?
textByHashes.167577c27e07614bc006ac3c0012f0497e5eb7d5: Oh, jolly bad luck, what? Not quite the brainbox you thought you were, eh?
textByHashes.83ad78a918f2120d805d6a2d28e6a595aaa4fa95: Well, never mind! You have an open invitation to join our organisation, so when you're feeling a little smarter, come back and talk to me again!
textByHashes.1b342065b9a9f77bca1c22da95fd0290233275e7: Ah, what ho! Back for another go at the old testing, what?
textByHashes.3be03c12b81f732288b2788f79fa748e8901447a: Oh, jolly well done! Your performance will need to be evaluated by Sir Vey personally, but I don't think it's going too far ahead of myself to welcome you to the team!
textByHashes.274cbafb74fba9f91e0be9a44263694804e9ba0e: Now how can I help you old gal?
textByHashes.356a8759e73208fefab3af85c0af14b94ca621ef: Well, I may have a mission for you, but it seems you are not quite ready for it yet.
textByHashes.4e9765cf93d98b298c5d535ce98d511ca63dae92: Now how can I help you young fellow?
textByHashes.a5ec95f938686047e7571d75014ef10298b9cfd1: Now how can I help you young mistress?
textByHashes.f941729bb0c278c0c504f315d3c0554f8325493e: Well, now that you are a White Knight we can process your application form correctly.
textByHashes.386b2add65682be5b5f0b6428714d1e05595a437: Already done, old bean! The scales of justice never sleep.
textByHashes.7047f14d79f3017418ca1e2a9e642d7e4ef42441: So then, dear gal; with that in mind, we have a mission for you.
textByHashes.af66b7fcba2cc442f0ae28f4995d64fd2dcd13f3: What? Ah, no actually. We're sending you to Ardougne.
textByHashes.5211b15ac60397a9cea78721026978b50f0f77ba: No, no, no, nothing happening in Ardougne. However, there is something going on in Witchaven to the south-east of Ardougne.
textByHashes.84cfc36358a82f8ee837f85b2861e28049ec759b: Haw, Haw, Haw, very funny old bean. I need you to report to Col O'Niall in Witchaven. He's a retired Temple Knight, but his clearance is still active. He will be able to fill you in.
textByHashes.143e3c1c2e43508ebceb4c07a79348ee99ea408b: Remember to use the Temple Knight code phrase: 'In Falador, the geese fly backwards on Tuesdays'.
textByHashes.9d0b4e55e55da193fbeee61c49612ba7c279c894: Nonsense, my man, we take our work very seriously. The fate of the world rests in our hands, don't you know.
textByHashes.c32fcb37441c9442d3a5b24e5bc5bef2af3e7358: Nonsense, my gal, we take our work very seriously. The fate of the world rests in our hands, don't you know.
textByHashes.8bf29405789bbb0317ba027fdbcfb0eb49f8df0a: Hmm, you'll need to get your CommOrb before I send you off old bean.
textByHashes.5a6448888f52b3373d387871b000d71ce8813006: Oh, before you go, I just need to update your CommOrb with the new mission parameters.
textByHashes.1c9ba1dabdae218c5a8ed0e6ba18be794552d6c0: Now, is there anything else I can do for you?
textByHashes.065a3caab17a2b58a34bc88ad00ece398afd860f: As you wish, old bean. Do let me know if you reconsider.
textByHashes.1310ac826f834e8a35921e1742b50bb19e5048ce: Free up some inventory space first, what?
textByHashes.1ce47c5e3887e62a2745f38189a020f40bf17717: Very careless of you, what? Here, take another, but be careful of this one!
textByHashes.889d33475f9a399000c2d720643f81ab3300ea9e: Nonsense, dear gal, it can't be as bad as all that.
textByHashes.6030ad00106028b544442e11d59d0fb9c1844bc7: Why don't you relax a little and tell Sir Tiffy what's wrong, hmm?
textByHashes.879b3944490b039375deecba45ea8c13072a4d2e: Oh dear, that is a shame. Please go on.
textByHashes.a2224c313787e567b27d36780898c6de95ac7288: Ahh, the Mother Mallum. Dear-oh-dear, this isn't good news at all.
textByHashes.47032fcbb167bf2678958689cd8026011d3c1650: Excellent! That should delay her plans somewhat. If she follows the same pattern as last time, the important figures of Gielinor will be her next targets.
textByHashes.b06dee3eafe73bf8c9d24745a2890c8d62ef3eb9: I think we are going to have to increase our surveillance somewhat.
textByHashes.6de3720099e44700dc901cafe4bf9b4726509eb0: Seeing as you already have a familiarity with the sea slugs, I am going to place you personally in charge of this mission.
textByHashes.9a579928cdc34a5080a67d19fa92e16c4c34d2f5: Of course you are, my gal. Now you will need access to some of the more restricted resources of the Temple Knights.
textByHashes.f6f649cd5e71cacc694f91602114d37b40f81930: So, with immediate effect, I am promoting you within the Temple Knights. Congratulations!
textByHashes.bea8eca1595952aefb2262aee605f5166e5c2c18: I only wish it were under better circumstances.
textByHashes.44653ec4f87d5981230e80a7c15838d1b66cb6a8: Tish, pashaw and nonsense. It's about time you were rewarded for your work.
textByHashes.06e49300d39eb538c33601820687fd3a01270dbf: Now, with this promotion comes some new responsibilities. In due time you will have access to the Temple Knight headquarters, but for now we need to collate our
textByHashes.d3181c0542edf6d31f7a442a003be79ccea53a36: Report back to me in a little while and I'll have some new tasks for you.
textByHashes.0e905abbffb18cc74634abd2031ba35cccf406fd: Good lass. Oh and Colonel O'Niall has been placed on our disavowed list. He should be considered extremely dangerous and is to be killed on sight.
textByHashes.e49af930cadbd54b237092aed346f1d39a58b465: What ho, sirrah. Jolly good show on the old training grounds thingy, what?
textByHashes.4f994ad997396d647ede0125b8a97e22b5b61b59: What ho, milady. Jolly good show on the old training grounds thingy, what?
textByHashes.2818acb3cfb1c92d214617402ba2412ccf476145: Well old boy, looking at the old dossier we have on you here there seems to be a tiny problem, what?
textByHashes.43d1a7872a38ed3d1f7f391f6537241f29a9383a: Well old gal, looking at the old dossier we have on you here there seems to be a tiny problem, what?
textByHashes.423fe1d42ad51e73ae8764cab24f6e1acc3e5791: Well old bean, looking at the old dossier we have on you here there seems to be a tiny problem, what?
textByHashes.d01d41d0e62b172edadd1e56aabc3793a466a137: Well OF COURSE we have a dossier on you! We have a dossier on EVERYONE! It's our job, dontchaknow!
textByHashes.93e0ddf60816b539875c1f860c20788e259e0f1a: Well now, seems we made a tiny blunder when we first contacted you to join the Temple Knights, what?
textByHashes.57ec1a4ec9b2cc4aa8aa67fecaae557f75cde99d: Entirely our own fault, could have been avoided and all that, but a bit of a show-stopper, what?
textByHashes.342ad7a48962cfee092d0d18170ab6e64965f1a1: Well lad, here's the thing: Only members of the White Knights may join the Temple Knights. By ancient decree, dontchaknow.
textByHashes.9bc58ee8603c63dd17e5209a9f88a120f64a78dc: Well lass, here's the thing: Only members of the White Knights may join the Temple Knights. By ancient decree, dontchaknow.
textByHashes.8074dec0687c5d030da5ee23eaa31ade1021e894: Calm yourself down lad... We have no intention of 'getting rid of you', we are very keen on seeing you join us...
textByHashes.f2707125b9fe30f4789d0d8920c6d27387280808: Calm yourself down lass... We have no intention of 'getting rid of you', we are very keen on seeing you join us...
textByHashes.70698dc3cb431ef04137d303e4e3d0de529eb026: Well, it's like this: Although you have performed a mission on behalf of the White Knights, you were never actually working for them.
textByHashes.6ed9ac5d9beacd0fd0320a0778d77767c02b0e76: As I say, when our order was founded, we were expected to take the best of the best, and it was assumed that anyone worth having on the team would have been a White Knight already, what?
textByHashes.7d624a388f557e9d14278ee75d3cd4ececa7eab4: Sadly, this is not the case anymore, and the fact that you have to serve as a Squire to a White Knight for a minimum period of five years before you can actually become one tends to put the more short-attention spanned adventurers off joining, what?
textByHashes.6b3bcbe924f872da60d8b18524eaf7fc5fefe055: Haw Haw Haw! No, no, goodness me, no!
textByHashes.e00817bf5849064d42b442e61883c5b7bd99c4d7: Five years is a very long period of time nowadays – ANYTHING could happen in that time, and we need capable men like yourself as soon as possible.
textByHashes.b6f82ba75176d85061941f05940568d405c9baa7: Five years is a very long period of time nowadays – ANYTHING could happen in that time, and we need capable women like yourself as soon as possible.
textByHashes.357b10b0f385503af8f18e64b8a190dcb951a52c: No, I had a bit of a chat with Sir Vey, and we came up with... A different solution to the problem. Assuming you're still interested, of course.
textByHashes.dfd9144903950c4fa214c48fb4e871f9b3f8ef74: I quite understand, what? No, don't worry, we were doing a little research into the White Knight Charter, and found an interesting loophole, what?
textByHashes.e139ef58bbef396ec19f440c562652064e918af5: Well, sorry to hear you say that boy, but I can't hold it against you.
textByHashes.6f31597e0ead1abe6a60d2799099d01e5837222f: Well, sorry to hear you say that gal, but I can't hold it against you.
textByHashes.09968dfd55cb2ef531089e88daad6df5e1c85402: Well, sorry to hear you say that bean, but I can't hold it against you.
textByHashes.8c9248f65a397d305dfa12c86abab99ce71ea452: You will of course still be entitled to all that we can provide you with at an initiate level, but sadly you will never advance beyond that in our order. Was there anything you wanted?
textByHashes.51c7935b7a7176d081cd2f166de943c69207eebf: Well now, it's really very simple. I want you to go to Sir Amik, tell him that you have decided to not join the Temple Knights, and that you have decided to become a White Knight instead.
textByHashes.612cfcac3a99f38314ec25e54622aaccc147946d: He will then offer you to join as a squire; you will then decline his offer, and ask if you can be deputised instead.
textByHashes.ce06d51df6dc1ab89d3063b057f5eb19a0bb59c2: If you run into any problems with that, come and see me.
textByHashes.697a8ee51b2c71f533ee58263bc41a94bb4f6967: Ah, your curiosity does you credit old boy! Let me tell you a little history lesson.
textByHashes.8006dae403de2599e45e6a493adfb969899e4a4e: Many centuries ago, the founders of the White Knights realized that in times of crisis, a long waiting period for new Knights could be disastrous for the kingdom, so they added a clause to the founding charter that would
textByHashes.7e5f2827d840a7da610341384cf40734ad51bb45: allow any citizen who has performed an act in the name of the White Knight to become deputised on a purely temporary basis to a full-fledged White Knight.
textByHashes.fbfaed96d4e250d2d0fe47fee6a9ebbc92a2b21a: Well now, your actions in the Black Knights' Fortress on behalf of the White Knights make you eligible to be deputised.
textByHashes.859b94a03eef8bcdbd02c94ebe1b44e919438e1a: Besides, you passed the trials to become a Temple Knight, what? If you're good enough to join the elite, then we'd not hesitate to deputise you into the White Knights.
textByHashes.3d9f9127ee2a49e0cd51687f19d9320bd095fb30: Ah, well this is where the beauty of the plan lies, dontchaknow?
textByHashes.c09575b0a1785f7dbb75ab18eb0d433d2ed2a26a: Once you have been deputised, for the time that you are still working for their order, you are subject to all of the same rules and regulations that normal White Knights are, which means you are also eligible for battlefield
textByHashes.b80fdf42d4fcaf50312448a5f96ba2951ec76db6: Let me put it like this; As a deputy you will be considered the lowest possible rank of the White Knight, and may be removed entirely from their order at a whim.
textByHashes.3d094f0eaab665db4a060b820b7eef94fd4ffb48: However, should you achieve some great feat while serving as a White Knight that you would be eligible for a promotion from, then by their own rules you would then have to be raised to a higher level within their order, and
textByHashes.ef85cd7c3991436d8d8d8c75adb706a9fb732161: it would therefore become impossible to remove your rank, or make you no longer a deputy.
textByHashes.5355f36ab9175b74e4389a42b2e51d2f8d974d73: Indeed. We Temple Knights have our reputation for a reason, donchaknow?
textByHashes.da9b7bdf2762ab46162b6214b7e320d676ea5fce: Ah, do not concern yourself with THAT old boy; Crisis is such a subjective term, and as you will find out when you join us fully in the Temple Knights, is always some potential crisis or other brewing.
textByHashes.137ad4fbdc00e75cd136e482867f920df9ca0abf: Ah, do not concern yourself with THAT old gal; Crisis is such a subjective term, and as you will find out when you join us fully in the Temple Knights, is always some potential crisis or other brewing.
textByHashes.d14de7d8fe826e889ae7250f86743ef6ea9cf0ab: If we weren't as good at our jobs we were, almost every day would be a day of crisis!
textByHashes.55c58cc591b342cb2d65c60c23f7af19a5a35f13: All we really need to do is allow the old White Knights to handle a problem that we would normally deal with, and that should be a sufficient crisis to allow you to be deputised, donchaknow.
textByHashes.47d11c15b1cf684ebbda34a08d79144f44e64a34: No, not at all, this is merely a ruse; Sir Amik knows full well that his authority over our organization is limited, so he will not deputise you unless he thinks that you are entirely unaffiliated with us.
textByHashes.1c9f1888c94042e6789529e0772008a2959657c0: You are simply going to tell him that you have decided not to join us so that he will in turn deputise you to join the White Knights! We of course still want you to join us, it is just a
textByHashes.42459a650e4f3a7b31ad91c79656b318632b425a: You are to go to Sir Amik Varze, leader of the White Knights of Falador, and are to tell him that you have decided not to join the Temple Knights.
textByHashes.3c6322a56462ebbe7f78c6b99a8407f0cc21d68f: We will send him a messenger confirming this. He will offer you the opportunity to become his squire, you are to decline, and ask if you can be deputised instead.
textByHashes.22b406e543a214ead36978be6c135680555d9d5d: If you run into any problems with that, you are then to come and see me for further advice.
textByHashes.4fa1d41b2cbe07e1e5efb281be0858e7ff9cf391: [sigh] This is a less than illustrious start to your career with us .
textByHashes.a463fcd0097063adfefa313bf0d63af11ee00d5c: Never mind, all is not lost, I have sent word to Amik that a dangerous criminal we once thought exiled is on the loose again, and that he should send all available White Knights to confront him.
textByHashes.90c4d1774797f59d9ddbcae523ec50217ff7ca71: This should give him enough of a scare to deputise you immediately.
textByHashes.73c0de2ad5d25323db0187444210f7d72614d8e3: Go and speak to Amik again, and then immediately come back here, we will need to prepare you for your mission.
textByHashes.a1b68998a8c79a032bb189b83f6193f88f5500ec: Haw Haw Haw, fitting right in with the Temple Knight way of thinking, what?
textByHashes.f4f2f5cf4cf9aee39a7e9f4009a3c1d6f0d0f047: Well as a matter of fact, I will not have to organise anything, there is a particularly vicious and dangerous criminal currently at loose!
textByHashes.f8d01c07a7ea64756256070aa3ad827c58cdfaae: I have already notified Sir Amik through the usual channels, so just go and speak to him quickly, then pop back here and we'll get you equipped for the hunt, what?
textByHashes.e88d6a0a3b45f0a4c8c74fd484c50e20c9326ecc: Ah, yes, well most awfully sorry about all the running around you've been doing old bean, but when it comes to our line of work, sometimes the indirect route is the best, what?
textByHashes.6683092fb26f3a1d534e825fc37a6b0ad01af06a: Awfully sorry dear heart, it's just a term of affection, what? Anyway...
textByHashes.515204a9e8a23f8b02ea94ac6a736addd0baf922: This criminal is a very dangerous fellow, and has some very dangerous friends.
textByHashes.93e2560ef0cb34e18708e7411e9aed0fcc2b4c79: If he has no reason to suspect you to be working for us, then he will be a little sloppier than he otherwise might be, because he will just assume you to be one of those stupid White Knights.
textByHashes.f3e8eb2bf063962be401e104bdd643861642aca0: We want this man caught, for the good of the country, and if we need to fool a few people into thinking you're nothing to do with us, and you have to do a little extra walking, then that's what is going to happen, what?
textByHashes.4140b235fdf866e38aeccf9fc9a778eeb0bc9c49: Go and report to Sir Amik for 'orders'. You will be unsurprised to find out he will now be prepared to deputise you.
textByHashes.6f6adf00861b960f944737c80ad56ad5ed78e2a3: After you have spoken to him return here immediately, your life will be at risk without our assistance, and we don't want you dying on your first mission for us, what?
textByHashes.9bbbdf572926575c75c1638236adbe2fd67bd297: His name is Solus Dellagar, and honestly, he is one of the most dangerous men on the planet.
textByHashes.38b9bc53a6a9ab4c50b102a3c0b527ba14ae645b: Not only is he extremely adapt at magic, he is also quite prepared to use that magic at a moments notice, because he is quite, quite mad.
textByHashes.1b753c1a6cbd1d622206d52e121b45826ee38c1c: No, no, no. Listen to me boy; You are under NO CIRCUMSTANCES to engage him directly in combat!
textByHashes.9184ef57adafdc586264298029c907108dc86d0e: No, no, no. Listen to me girl; You are under NO CIRCUMSTANCES to engage him directly in combat!
textByHashes.75f36970f8f6d5a0d9332d9e1efa7935dbc8ae15: You are to act as our agent and track him down, when you have managed to corner him somewhere then we will send in a field recovery team directly to take him away without incident.
textByHashes.438f1e5fbf2caf2b04abe1c8f02ecef65c73f2c9: I cannot stress this enough; You are to observe and locate, you are NOT to enter a combat situation!
textByHashes.9baa70edd4a4cd9053e8c267bfde7e83b6ebdb23: Well old boy, we need to equip you for the task, but you'll need to get something for me first, what?
textByHashes.2ffd2f64036b532fb48dfa346ef0da0b7d41669e: Well old girl, we need to equip you for the task, but you'll need to get something for me first, what?
textByHashes.9f26968817ff762b9de1141fcd0310b34ffbb421: Well, we teach our operatives the value of their equipment by making them pay for it, what?
textByHashes.9dff46120e3d0a211d89f232a8e576eb39365550: You have two choices here, you can either give me the cash directly, and I will hand it over, or you can bring me the raw materials and I will make you one.
textByHashes.0c2090a694c8c12fd108f94fbe8ed083375f5582: Well we in the Temple Knights have some specific equipment for situations such as this dontchaknow, but you'll need to free up some inventory space first!
textByHashes.aff0724e150118364cf59a892727289d354ad418: It's 10,000 coins for the Temple Knight Communication Orb. You have that kind of money with you?
textByHashes.836d2e212ac84b4afd7a443aa41c2efefe47d100: Then you wish to purchase a Temple Knight Communication Orb?
textByHashes.0694518140ef08945e3bd980065c1ce3bc192c42: Here take this Communications Orb, or 'CommOrb' for short.
textByHashes.b605357bde6eec30fd2d0fd6280c6c557a178016: It is a precise magical mechanism that we can use to track him, by sending data of the surrounding area back to one of our information operatives at the Temple Knight Headquarters.
textByHashes.68fe79e3c52d2f993cbfb6a61bbbda948a2d7374: Your information operative is known as Savant, I suggest you contact them using your CommOrb at your earliest convenience.
textByHashes.fce98a5c1a4b05fb0f6790a01756276ffc7b4917: They will be able to send you any useful data about Solus directly through it for your perusal, dontchaknow.
textByHashes.4f7b6d0945b0b410e29c618f98c4af5a252a4431: Perhaps you would like to just bring me the components of it then, what?
textByHashes.312fd9bb672870cefe279f226735571f5a41f375: Bring me one law rune, one slayer gem and one piece of molten glass and I will make you a Communication Orb.
textByHashes.8f40c03b0a3e3811dca6fa7446503b25d59367db: Heavens, boy! I am not a pawn shop, to be holding bits and pieces for you while you go off and do something else!
textByHashes.f14f668138284cd72b3f0b7857fe6659e1288b0b: No, no you bring me all three components at the same time, what?
textByHashes.d05fd8001c6ae50cf12a3be1cc7e302ccbd3709c: Excellent! You wish me to make you one now then, what?
textByHashes.9a2c532343805b453d005821a9a3e6ca141c94fa: Bringing me either cash or items so that I can equip you for your mission correctly.
textByHashes.2abfc55776449ba8be2504b33625efb20eff647e: You are hunting for Solus Dellagar, the evil criminal mastermind.
textByHashes.bfb8cb4f3f268ef78e3e639f8abec67c07c3d7cd: I suggest you contact Savant through your CommOrb and see if she can send you any relevant information about your assignment.
textByHashes.d9a8518c7a9393ca6f169df7deb4946864b8c5b7: Had a little help doing it though, didn't you, what?
textByHashes.47cf4e91e0e88d1f836c266038bc7cb915e26bc1: That you did Initiate, that you did.
textByHashes.674e8be5739d296e1a4fa44e3009d2ba7b4b5609: Now take that hat of Solus over to Sir Amik, and we can begin to process your application form as a Temple Knight again, what?
textByHashes.e399bd2a2f5f502f6313e867800d50d61dbcaef7: Good day, Proselyte. I heard from Akrisae what happened with that Lucien business. Be sure to keep your chin up. We'll get the old boy sooner or later.
textByHashes.06bbfd603ea78dfc4378bb9afa6f07fd9dcd731f: Don't mention it, old bean. Now, is there anything I can do for you?
textByHashes.a0e76c1a08c35a04449c8a9fc1ba007b65d4f03a: Sorry old bean but we are still in the process of organising.
textByHashes.7eec5ccea3ce7e44af9df93d3b96d9a306218e31: I'm sure that we will have something for you soon, so please feel free to check back later. Anything else I can do for you in the meantime?
textByHashes.4f42efa44e06f4441168f5d7d7dad5e68d2b5504: Ah yes, you've been helping out the Ardougne authorities I hear.
textByHashes.bc1b0a4ee032536d0d1c46b3462e10270219248f: Of course! Knowledge is my business, old bean, and it pays to know what's happening across the other kingdoms.
textByHashes.576aa91909d4656ef3f9c465a46e66675e63ae1a: Now, as for your assassin, quite messy stuff, what? We've been trying to track him down ever since the Entrana incident, but he's proven quite the tricky one to pin down. Curious him showing up in Ardougne.
textByHashes.983c395f401af2f409ce58da78ae1352934e4f4a: Sadly, very little. Until we can learn more about what he's up to, we don't have much to go on. You have nothing to fear though, we'll find him sooner or later!
textByHashes.58f971db042a564bd8468e60b7d8f43d3285bdd0: Now, anything else you need, milady?
textByHashes.385bcacc45757215dae04f3892ad6c617a07172c: Now, anything else you need, sirrah?
textByHashes.81a8d5df4062fc8dc671ee4efee08104df3ee585: Certainly milady! As you know, we Temple Knights are personally favoured by Saradomin himself.
textByHashes.0326dda8cd67865265e55ce199b2dd8c2e5c6f88: Certainly sirrah! As you know, we Temple Knights are personally favoured by Saradomin himself.
textByHashes.96148159cac0ecf33c1c69a0bbe44e8ed5eb5ec6: And when I say personally favoured, I don't mean that sometime off in the future he's going to buy us all a drink!
textByHashes.209c725538915d2d688306e551028dd03fae3513: He watches over each of us, and when we die he catches us as we fall, and ensures we arrive back at Falador castle safe and sound.
textByHashes.e0248feb0b49d1059b6292fb657aa610f4ba0dc6: We usually lose some equipment when he does so, but it's a small price to pay to be hale and hearty again, what?
textByHashes.bec3cddd1f438bca9fed415e7a28187146d58e43: Some lucky fellows have a similar system going already, but when they die they spawn in that squalid little swamp village Lumbridge.
textByHashes.52485bb5117bf32ab9a59f60bc239b2649852468: Well, you should be glad that we offer you a step up then! Falador is clearly a far superior town to spend your time in!
textByHashes.c52ff7f60c8128270077b524b998cc86df5c3113: Was there something else you wanted to ask good old Tiffy, milady?
textByHashes.ae1d650e4078f2905019646491e8ab532d6f2341: Was there something else you wanted to ask good old Tiffy, sirrah?
textByHashes.2003ea62fcab84cfae3ac3b99d64f439591db3c9: Of course old bean. I can sell you up to Proselyte level items only I'm afraid.
textByHashes.d97693326a74911f1d7f4ca902a5e682379e0c83: Ah, so you'd like to respawn in Falador, the good old homestead! Are you sure?
textByHashes.1ac3b4b95cb81efaa8521597c0d21b52a0389b1e: Top-hole, what? Good old Fally is definitely the hot-spot nowadays!
textByHashes.9855998dac39a90bfc6c16b4d1c8660894a49f1b: As you wish, what? Ta-ta for now.
textByHashes.ba8c04c868f9c6d440154d46cb145abdd264369e: What? You're saying you want to respawn in Lumbridge? Are you sure?
textByHashes.9ac0a6467b10a8a5720c601fa8e6bf2193533877: Why anyone would want to visit that smelly little swamp village of oiks is quite beyond me, I'm afraid, but the deed is done now.
textByHashes.186204363f84a44e983227d14ad289552281e0a6: What ho, old boy. Well, hand it over and let's have a look, shall we?
textByHashes.2b7ac76d7a422baf06e09c90235655611aac8e4e: What ho, old gal. Well, hand it over and let's have a look, shall we?
textByHashes.878f0e3d346c01827c8c4c249c283d5b286d453c: What ho, old bean. Well, hand it over and let's have a look, shall we?
textByHashes.f5f2505af714f8192e6122eba5b285e7c4e82b68: Now, let's see what is so urgent. Hmmm...
textByHashes.425ae05489d50139efa108b2e9870687bfdf170a: Well, you've been a great help, so I'll tell you a bit about this, shall I? Several weeks ago, a dwarven explorer, named Nestor Peregrine, discovered the entrance to an ancient cave complex while exploring the
textByHashes.9a868cc958270266bd9971947fdbaec909e9fdd8: troll mountains. On his return to Keldagrim, he celebrated in a tavern where we have an informant. The dwarf spoke of a great treasure, apparently mentioned in dwarven legend, and of creatures of great
textByHashes.0c9905ffd1ee5e42a58f8c5cbb09b65f69fa564b: evil, fighting those of great good. I sent Sir Gerry and a small command of knights to investigate the dwarf's stories several months ago and it appears that he has found the resting place of that incredible weapon: the
textByHashes.d7f282ed0c390eec6371ef92679cca9365b12c42: During the great God Wars, the evil usurper Zamorak gathered many ancient relics and armies to his cause. There were none powerful enough to stand alone before his might, so our glorious Lord Saradomin
textByHashes.ccfc68c6a0f4e8d8e247ba922e19c5a22c747b15: gathered a triumverate of gods to stem the tide of evil. They came together and, using great magics, they created the Godsword; a weapon so mighty that it could slay even a god. It was forged in the flames of a
textByHashes.3ed13d403738734cf7a8f78054f7281297816bd2: volcano and tempered by the tears of the icyene. The mightiest warriors to stand before the army of evil were the aviansie: birdmen followers of Armadyl. They were a proud and mighty warrior race. To them fell the task of
textByHashes.68b809f22ac537c7754b8f689c81c177aabbcee8: delivering the Godsword to the holy armies that gathered to oppose Zamorak's evil. Unfortunately, they were attacked by an army of demons before they could reach the safety of the main army. It was a fiendish
textByHashes.081f1f99d291ea91ad971beacbae542737f38423: stroke by the forces of darkness. At the same time as they attacked the aviansie, they also mounted a huge attack on the main armies that opposed them. Realising their intent, several of the gods that were allied against
textByHashes.e856f9b280cec834c886794f34759c1153924c21: Zamorak sent forces to aid the besieged aviansie, who had retreated into a temple in the mountains. The forces of Saradomin and Bandos arrived in the midst of a pitched battle for the Godsword, and it was during this
textByHashes.bb76ec82cb1d0c5ed816fb4c4df3d5536103c87d: battle that the sword was sundered. Shortly thereafter, the evil one cast a spell of such devastation that it flattened the entire northern half of Gielinor, reducing it to what we now call the Wilderness. This temple must
textByHashes.1f02291d567a0ed27bcfcf33a873a6a8ac72d476: have collapsed, sealing the combatants in.
textByHashes.5dbbd6210e38e4fbc16ad80b40691844742f1aae: Apparently not. It appears that a millennia-old battle is still being fought beneath the ruins of the temple, and the prize for winning the battle is the Godsword! Hmm... Well, thank you very much, old boy. You've been a
textByHashes.ea172a3e196e35d0187d4ff644328192c350ce18: Apparently not. It appears that a millennia-old battle is still being fought beneath the ruins of the temple, and the prize for winning the battle is the Godsword! Hmm... Well, thank you very much, old gal. You've been a
textByHashes.3a72e3424362335aef9b209f1645fd2027dcb874: Apparently not. It appears that a millennia-old battle is still being fought beneath the ruins of the temple, and the prize for winning the battle is the Godsword! Hmm... Well, thank you very much, old bean. You've been a
textByHashes.3f131986884335902598a79eeecc98dd7581e214: great help. I shall pass it on to my superiors.
textByHashes.bd9c8c526a21658d5cad8994d50a5199ef1545eb: Yes, yes. All in good time. I'll have to consult my commanding officer first. Thank you, old boy, you're dismissed.
textByHashes.8095a16dba700f56707fa6dd322f9a6aca87c833: Yes, yes. All in good time. I'll have to consult my commanding officer first. Thank you, old gal, you're dismissed.
textByHashes.362be897959d759b8d72bf3a9b1cfc69faa53c8b: Yes, yes. All in good time. I'll have to consult my commanding officer first. Thank you, old bean, you're dismissed.
textByHashes.1d0b3b769924cef5561acd114cf2ccd339c176d6: Now, let's see what is so urgent. Hmm... I see that this scroll has been tampered with! The wax seal is broken.
textByHashes.944fea0e7f793d51ae9d463b0be43ad4b1d47c74: I see. Anyway, let's see what it says.
textByHashes.4ea2ada1571d8d2614b9e02c3d4f9a80c6d95e0a: Oh dear. Well, thank you very much, old boy. You've been a great help. I shall pass it on to my superiors.
textByHashes.c2ca2af28465270327b4962f9be16828244ceb8c: Oh dear. Well, thank you very much, old gal. You've been a great help. I shall pass it on to my superiors.
textByHashes.1391d5adc9dfb7f8d0a99df42ed8f31a07b9d1d1: Oh dear. Well, thank you very much, old bean. You've been a great help. I shall pass it on to my superiors.
textByHashes.b76736c9a0f9e07926db621b7e636f0949132fb9: Ah, you must be one of us. I must share this information with you: 40,41;1,6;49;12;1,2;37,41;45;89,75;16,20;103
